questions.question: What international outfit ran an ad with Patrick Stewart advising: "Keep the light on human rights"?
Who referred to her on-screen persona, Ripley, as "Rambolina"?
What two nations formally separated in 1993 in what was dubbed the "Velvet Divorce"?
What's the deepest major root many deciduous trees use to tap into ground moisture?
What 60-year-old gave up one hit in three innings against the Red Sox in 1965?
Who always ended her PBS cooking shows with "Bon appétit"?
